nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Candida Bombicola/Glucose/(Gardenia Jasminoides/Schisandra Chinensis) Fruit/Camellia Sinensis Leaf/Turmeric Root/(Grape Seed/Olive Fruit/Rice Germ/Sunflower Seed) Oil Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Candida Bombicola/Glucose/(Gardenia Jasminoides/Schisandra Chinensis) Fruit/Camellia Sinensis Leaf/Turmeric Root/(Grape Seed/Olive Fruit/Rice Germ/Sunflower Seed) Oil Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of glucose, the fruit of Gardenia jasminoides and Schisandra chinensis, the leaves of Camellia sinensis, the roots of Curcuma longa (tumeric), Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Germ Oil, and Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, by the microorganism, Candida bombicola.
inciName: CANDIDA BOMBICOLA/GLUCOSE/(GARDENIA JASMINOIDES/SCHISANDRA CHINENSIS) FRUIT/CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF/TURMERIC ROOT/(GRAPE SEED/OLIVE FRUIT/RICE GERM/SUNFLOWER SEED) OIL FERMENT FILTRATE
